debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
C : Category α
D : Category β
F G : Functor α β
η : @CategoryInContext.NaturalTransformation α β C D F G
h : @CategoryInContext.IsNatIso α β C D F G η
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
⊢ comp
      (have this := @h X;
      (fun f hf => f.inv) (Classical.choose ⋯) ⋯)
      (Functor.homF f) =
    comp (Functor.homF f)
      (have this := @h Y;
      (fun f hf => f.inv) (Classical.choose ⋯) ⋯)

failed_attempts:
have hX := h X; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX; choose iX hX using hX
    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY; choose iY hY using hY
    have nat := η.naturality f
    rw [← hX, ← hY] at nat
    rw [← comp_id (iX.inv ≫ F.homF f), ← iY.hom_inv_id, ← assoc, ← nat, assoc, iX.inv_hom_id, id_comp]

    have hY := h Y; rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hY; choose iY hiY using hY
